evidence_refs.quote: We present a guarded, trust-weighted memory store designed as an additive extension to the OMX (oh-my-codex) memory Model Context Protocol (MCP) surface. The existing OMX memory server provides unweighted project memory and notepad tools with no trust semantics, provenance tracking, or quarantine mechanisms. We implement a dependency-free Node.js prototype that introduces four MCP-style tools—`guarded_memory_put`, `guarded_memory_query`, `guarded_memory_observe`, and `guarded_memory_stats`—stori
